overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player driving through foggy neon-lit tunnels and underpasses at night, transitioning to on-foot exploration of a dystopian urban intersection beneath elevated highways. The scene features wet reflective surfaces, industrial architecture, and sparse traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban underpass with fluorescent tube lighting

events.description: a dark sedan passes by in the opposite direction
a blue truck passes on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating through a wet, dimly lit tunnel underpass at moderate speed

entered.detail: rows of fluorescent tube lights illuminating the underpass ceiling
smooth dark concrete walls with vertical ribbed patterns
smooth dark concrete walls with vertical ribbed patterns
double yellow lines running down the center of the wet asphalt

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person driving perspective through a narrow, enclosed tunnel underpass. Fluorescent lights line the ceiling above wet asphalt reflecting the artificial illumination. The environment is completely sheltered with no sky visible, and sparse traffic passes by occasionally.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange beneath elevated concrete ramps

events.description: exits the enclosed tunnel into a more open underpass area with visible sky above
ambient light increases as the vehicle emerges from deep shadow into the foggy night

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive under massive concrete overpasses and ramps, approaching an urban intersection

notable_agents.action: white sedan driving ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpasses and ramps creating multiple levels
large industrial building with illuminated 'MILITECH' signage on the facade
tall poles with bright white LED street lights
dense network of electrical wires crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the enclosed tunnel into a sprawling highway interchange beneath massive concrete overpasses. The Militech building becomes visible in the distance with its glowing signage, while street lights and power lines frame the foggy night scene. The environment transitions from fully enclosed to semi-covered with partial sky visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk beneath elevated highways

events.description: vehicle stops and player exits, transitioning to on-foot movement
crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk while vehicles wait at the intersection

agents.ego_description: exiting the vehicle and walking across the crosswalk, navigating through sparse pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead on the crosswalk toward the Militech building
black sedan waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings
tall pole with red traffic signal and attached street light
metal security fencing running along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The player stops the vehicle and exits, transitioning to first-person walking. They cross a wide intersection marked with yellow zebra stripes, passing other pedestrians and waiting vehicles. The Militech building looms larger on the left while the environment opens up to full sky exposure under the foggy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk beneath elevated highway with industrial fencing and concrete pillars

events.description: moves from the open intersection onto the sidewalk under the highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beneath the massive concrete overpass structure, passing industrial buildings

entered.detail: massive cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the highway above
low-rise industrial structure with corrugated metal walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the player walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath the elevated highway overpass. Massive concrete pillars line the left side while chain-link fencing runs along the right. The environment returns to a semi-covered state with reduced sky visibility, maintaining the industrial dystopian atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective that transitions from a claustrophobic tunnel drive into an expansive, foggy urban intersection before returning to the shelter of industrial overpasses. It begins within a narrow, enclosed underpass where fluorescent ceiling lights reflect off wet asphalt, moving forward through sparse traffic. As the vehicle exits the tunnel, the environment opens into a sprawling highway interchange beneath massive concrete overpasses, revealing the glowing signage of the Militech building through the haze. The camera then shifts to a walking perspective as the player crosses a wide, yellow-striped intersection under a full night sky, passing pedestrians and idling cars. Finally, the scene narrows again as the player walks along a concrete sidewalk, flanked by massive pillars and chain-link fencing beneath the looming weight of the elevated highway.
